name: agentic-engineering
description: Opinionated engineering practices, conventions, and patterns designed to increase confidence in AI agent outputs.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Language-agnostic engineering workflow: /dev:init scaffolding, /dev:brainstorm, /dev:plan, /dev:implement with gated subagent execution.

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Opinionated Python knowledge pack (uv-based): FastAPI service conventions, testing, QA toolchain, project templates.

plugins.name: typescript-dev
plugins.description: Opinionated TypeScript knowledge pack (pnpm-based): type-checked tests with vitest, prettier formatting, QA chain.
